text: Moving from the seminar room to this colorful, interactive display labeled R+D, I feel a profound shift—from the orderly confines of structured learning to the stimulating chaos of innovation and discovery. My mind is awakened by the creative energy radiating from the vibrant walls and dynamic text panels. Here, surrounded by the artifacts of human invention, I am both observer and participant in the ongoing dance between knowledge and curiosity. I feel invigorated and open, eager to engage with new ideas and possibilities.
